turnOnDescriptions: Kōmman bwe en jerbal melele ko ilo ainikien

volumeSliderClosed: Bar in volume eo emōj kilōk
statusUsingDesc: Kōjerbal version eo kar kwalok kake
statusLoadingDesc: Ej bōktok version eo ippāñ melele ko ilo ainikien
statusUsingNoDesc: Kōjerbal version eo ejelok melele in ainikien
statusLoadingNoDesc: Loading version eo ejelok melele in ainikien

alertDescribedVersion: Kōjerbal audio eo kar kwalok kake ilo video eo
alertNonDescribedVersion: Kōjerbal version eo ejelok melele kin video eo
fallbackError2: Browser kein rej jerbal ibben player in
prefTitleCaptions: Men ko rej kōnan ñan subtitle
prefIntroCaptions: Men kein rej kōmmane rej lale ewi wawein an subtitle ko kwalok.
prefIntroDescription1: Player in ej jipan kōmeļeļe ko ilo ruo wewein:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Video eo kiõ ejelok an melele ilo jabdrewot wewein.
prefIntroDescription3: Kōjerbal form in iumin ñan kōmmane ta eo kwoj kōnaan ñan melele ko ilo text.
prefIntroDescription4: Elikin am kar kōjparok setting ko, kwomaroñ kōmman ak jolok audio description eo kin ejja button eo wot.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Player eo ilo peij in emaron in jerbal jen jabdewōt jikin ilo am kajerbal keyboard shortcuts (lale laajrak eo iumin).
prefIntroKeyboard2: Kwomaroñ kōmman modifier key ko (Alt, Control im/ak Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: KEJJERBAL: Jet key ko remaroñ jab errā ippān ko rej kōjerbali ilo browser eo am im/ak application ko jet. Kajeoñ kain kōllaajrak ko jet im modifier key ko mae ien kwoj loe ko rejimwe ñan kwe.
prefIntroTranscript: Men kein rej kōnan rej jelet transcription eo ej jerbal ibben don.
prefCookieWarning: Ñan kejbãrok men ko kwoj kōnaan, ej aikuj in wor kukiij ko.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Modifier key ko rej kōjerbali einwot keyboard shortcuts
prefHeadingTranscript: Transcription eo ej jerbal ibben don
escapeKeyFunction: Kilōk dialog eo kiõ ak popup eo
prefDescFormatHelp: Elañe format kein ruo rej bed, juon wōt iaer enaj kōjerbale.
prefDescFormatOption1: Bar juon video ippāñ melele ko ilo ainikien (emoj rekoote mokta).
prefDescFormatOption1b: juon wāween eo eoktak ippān kōmeļeļe ko ilo ainikien
prefDescFormatOption2: Meļeļe ko rej riit jen screen reader eo (TTS)
prefDescPause: Ej make bōjrak pija eo ñe juon kōmeļeļe ej jino
prefDescVisible: Kwalok melele ilo jeje elañe emōj
sampleDescriptionText: Kōmman oktak ko ñan am maroñ in roñjake melele in.
prefHighlight: Kōmeļeļeik jeje eo ilo an wōnm̧aanļo̧k wōt
windowMoveLeft: Wintō eo ear emmakit ñan anmiiñ
windowMoveRight: Wintō eo ear emmakit ñan anbijmaron
windowMoveUp: Wintō eo ear etal ñan lañ
windowMoveStopped: Eṃōj bōjrak an ṃakūtkūt in wintō eo
windowMoveAlert: Jibwe ak kōjerbal arrow key ko ñan ukōt window eo; Jiba Enter ñan bōjrak.
windowResizeAlert: Wintō eo emoj an oktak joñan.
windowSendBackAlert: Wintō in ejjab bed ilikin jabdrewot men.
windowBringTopAlert: Wintō in ej bed iman men ko jet ilo peij eo.
resultsSummary4: Klik ilo ien eo ej ekkejellok ñan jabdrewot men ñan kwalok pija eo jen ien eo.
productNameWp: Ri ikkure eo emaron TOTHOM ñan WordPress
copyrightSuffix: TOTHOMweb. Aolep maroñ ko rej bed wot.
webEditionDescription: Kar kōmmane im kalaplok an maroñ in bōk media player eo Able Player. Oktak ko im jerbal ko jet kar kōmmani jen TOTHOMweb rej software eo an make.
wpEditionDescription: WordPress plugin eo ej kobaik juon widget ñan Elementor, kar kōmmane ñan kobaik juon edition eo emōj kōmmane im kalaplok an media player eo Able Player. Oktak ko im jerbal ko jet kar kōmmani jen TOTHOMweb rej software eo an make.
thirdPartyDescription: Men in ej kobaik kein jerbal kein:
distributedUnder: Kar leto letak iumin kakien ko an
